text.content: The AGRIXTRA Radial Tire Series is now approved on select New Holland and Case IH Equipment in North America

rich_text.plain_text: The AGRIXTRA Radial Tire Series is now approved on select New Holland and Case IH Equipment in North America

text.content: MAXAM expands its growing global supply agreement by delivering its performance solutions

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM expands its growing global supply agreement by delivering its performance solutions

text.content: to select brand equipment in the North American Market

rich_text.plain_text: to select brand equipment in the North American Market

text.content: [Danvers, Massachusetts, December 13th, 2022] Growing its global supply commitment, MAXAM North America is pleased to announce the approval of the AGRIXTRA product line to select Case IH and New Holland brand equipment for the North American and Global Ag Markets.

rich_text.plain_text: [Danvers, Massachusetts, December 13th, 2022] Growing its global supply commitment, MAXAM North America is pleased to announce the approval of the AGRIXTRA product line to select Case IH and New Holland brand equipment for the North American and Global Ag Markets.

text.content: Over the years, the AGRIXTRA range of radial tires has built a formidable reputation for performance and value within the market, which is why MAXAM is pleased to provide its solutions to two leading global agricultural manufacturers. The approval of the AGRIXTRA tire series on both the Case IH and New Holland brand equipment in North America is another major leap forward for the MAXAM brand since the series launched over nine years ago.

rich_text.plain_text: Over the years, the AGRIXTRA range of radial tires has built a formidable reputation for performance and value within the market, which is why MAXAM is pleased to provide its solutions to two leading global agricultural manufacturers. The approval of the AGRIXTRA tire series on both the Case IH and New Holland brand equipment in North America is another major leap forward for the MAXAM brand since the series launched over nine years ago.

text.content: Offering improved traction, increased stability, and reduced slip, the AGRIXTRA family of products delivers a valuable solution to farmers and growers globally. Backed by an 8-year tire warranty, MAXAM’s confidence in its radial product offering is never wavering and is focused on protecting its customers’ investments.

rich_text.plain_text: Offering improved traction, increased stability, and reduced slip, the AGRIXTRA family of products delivers a valuable solution to farmers and growers globally. Backed by an 8-year tire warranty, MAXAM’s confidence in its radial product offering is never wavering and is focused on protecting its customers’ investments.

text.content: “This milestone highlights MAXAM’s growth ambitions in the agricultural sector. MAXAM has invested heavily in its radial agricultural series designed to perform at the most demanding levels delivering improved performance and value. We are confident that our products will bring valuable business solutions to both the Case IH and New Holland Brands,” says Gregory Gilland, VP of MAXAM Global Agriculture.

rich_text.plain_text: “This milestone highlights MAXAM’s growth ambitions in the agricultural sector. We are confident that our products will bring valuable business solutions to both the Case IH and New Holland Brands,” says Gregory Gilland, VP of MAXAM Global Agriculture.
